title: helichrysum orientale
intro: Helichrysum orientale, also known as the curry plant, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of volatile oils, particularly camphor, borneol, and pinene. The health benefits of Helichrysum orientale include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum orientale include teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
